message:
feat(parser,planner,mvcc): add SQL:2011 temporal query parsing and propagate time_travel field

- Add FOR SYSTEM_TIME AS OF clause parser supporting both COMMITSEQ <n>
  and timestamp string syntax for temporal/time-travel queries
- Add KwCommitseq token kind to the lexer
- Propagate time_travel: None to all QualifiedTableRef construction sites
  across parser, planner, and codegen test fixtures
- Use struct rest pattern (..) in collect_table_index_hints_inner to
  future-proof against new QualifiedTableRef fields
- Add claiming_timestamp to MVCC slot zero-on-reclaim list to ensure
  complete field cleanup on orphaned slot reclamation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -108,6 +108,7 @@ pub enum TokenKind {
     KwCollate,
     KwColumn,
     KwCommit,
+    KwCommitseq,
     KwConcurrent,
     KwConflict,
     KwConstraint,
@@ -276,6 +277,7 @@ impl TokenKind {
             "COLLATE" => Some(Self::KwCollate),
             "COLUMN" => Some(Self::KwColumn),
             "COMMIT" => Some(Self::KwCommit),
+            "COMMITSEQ" => Some(Self::KwCommitseq),
             "CONCURRENT" => Some(Self::KwConcurrent),
             "CONFLICT" => Some(Self::KwConflict),
             "CONSTRAINT" => Some(Self::KwConstraint),
@@ -527,6 +529,7 @@ impl TokenKind {
             Self::KwCollate => Some("COLLATE"),
             Self::KwColumn => Some("COLUMN"),
             Self::KwCommit => Some("COMMIT"),
+            Self::KwCommitseq => Some("COMMITSEQ"),
             Self::KwConcurrent => Some("CONCURRENT"),
             Self::KwConflict => Some("CONFLICT"),
             Self::KwConstraint => Some("CONSTRAINT"),
